Inquire
Start the conversation

Let's talk about where your organization actually is.

You don't need to have a plan yet — just start the conversation.

Send a note
Low pressure

This is not a sales call.

Our first conversation is about establishing context, not pushing a solution.

  • We don't pitch software or tools. We listen to where your organization is currently feeling the tension.

  • We will tell you honestly if we think you are further along than you realize, or if you need to slow down.

  • If Movemental isn't the right fit, we will point you to resources that are.

What happens next

What happens when you reach out.

A simple, straightforward process.

01

We reply

Within two business days, a founder will reply to your note.

02

Initial call

Thirty minutes. You share the context; we outline how we would approach it collaboratively.

03

Clarify

If it's a fit, we map out a structured diagnostic or a specific engagement path.

Who this is for

This conversation is most helpful if you are:

  • check Senior leader carrying responsibility for mission, people, and data integrity.
  • check Looking for a structured sequence to navigate AI adoption safely rather than just "tips and tricks."
  • check Ready to prioritize the slow work of discernment over the fast work of deployment.
Who this is not for

Movemental is likely not the right fit if you are:

  • close Looking for a traditional software demo or a sales pitch for a specific tool.
  • close Seeking "growth hacks" or using AI primarily for aggressive lead generation.
  • close Unwilling to include senior organizational leadership in the initial discovery process.
Send a note

Tell us what you are actually facing.

Fill out the form below. The more context you can provide, the better our first conversation will be.
